task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the Customer RMA window
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active tab, menu, or window title clearly shows 'Customer RMA' or 'Return Material Authorization' in the iDempiere interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the Business Partner is set to 'C&W Construction'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Business Partner' or 'BPartner' field in the RMA header is populated with 'C&W Construction'.

task_completion.description: Verify the RMA is linked to an existing completed shipment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shipment/Receipt' or 'InOut' reference field in the RMA header is populated with a shipment document number.

task_completion.description: Verify the Name or Description field is set to 'Defective Patio Set Return'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' or 'Description' field contains the exact text 'Defective Patio Set Return'.

task_completion.description: Verify an RMA line item has been created with a quantity of 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: The RMA Line tab or table shows at least one record containing a product from the shipment, and the 'Quantity' field for that line is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Verify the RMA document status remains 'Drafted'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Document Status' field shows 'Drafted' (or 'Draft') and there is no visual indication that the 'Complete' or 'Process' action was executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the iDempiere GUI rather than using terminal commands or direct database inserts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being actively used, with form fields being filled out manually or via UI automation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the standard iDempiere ERP interface, not a text editor, mock application, or unrelated webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the task requirements into a text editor to simulate completion
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Defective Patio Set Return' and 'C&W Construction' are entered into the correct iDempiere form fields, not a generic text window or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Business Partner must be exactly 'C&W Construction'. The RMA description must contain the keyword 'Defective' (specifically 'Defective Patio Set Return'). The RMA must have at least 1 line item created with a quantity of 1. The final document status must remain 'Drafted'.
